arts.ttl: Manchester United's 'recruitment is a MESS', blasts Paul Scholes - as Red Devils icon insists the club are 'relying more on hope than proven quality' in a dig at Erik ten Hag's transfer history
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's side will end the weekend in 14th place in the Premier League table with a goal difference of minus-three despite heavy recruitment over the summer.

arts.ttl: 'It's a mess' - Paul Scholes outlines factor which could end Erik ten Hag's Man United era
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag remains on thin ice after a goalless draw with Aston Villa in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Gary Neville has already made Erik ten Hag prediction after Man United's 'worst decision'
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's Manchester United future has been the subject of intense speculation in recent weeks, and Gary Neville has had his say on the situation

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans react to De Gea's DOUBLE penalty save
arts.sum: Man Utd fans react to De Gea's DOUBLE penalty save David de Gea has hit the headlines after saving two penalties during Fiorentina ’s 2-1 win over AC Milan on Sunday evening.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes slams Man Utd for 'relying on hope' in furious blast at five players
arts.sum: Manchester United's winless run has now stretched to five games, with club legend Paul Scholes launching a furious blast of their recruitment strategy following their draw with Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag picks out Man Utd players who must 'step up' as he fights to save job
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under huge pressure as Manchester United boss after failing to secure a win across what was thought to be a key week for the Dutchman and he has now sent a strong message to his players

arts.ttl: Better than Kane & Sesko: Man Utd rival Arsenal for Bundesliga goal machine
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly joined Arsenal in the race to sign Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush . Better than Kane & Sesko: Man Utd rival Arsenal for Bundesliga goal machine

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher dismisses Erik ten Hag explanation after Man United decision
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag made the bold call to leave Matthijs de Ligt and Lisandro Martinez out of his starting line up for the clash with Aston Villa on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Manchester United are 'not getting above Tottenham and Brighton in comparison to their performance', believes Les Ferdinand - as he insists he is 'struggling' to see an improvement
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag 's side extended their winless run to five matches with a 0-0 draw away to the in-form Aston Villa and end the weekend in 14th place in the table with a goal difference of minus-three.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has already explained Erik ten Hag sack decision as Manchester United draw vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as speculation around Erik ten Hag's future continues after United's draw with Aston Villa
